At P0 the sweep is the *split-structural* proxy; the model leave-one-order-out headline-metric stability across the sweep is the P4 GATE-1 acceptance condition (ADR-0004 D2 (b)); (4) all-vs-all train↔test consensus-distance histogram produced, **inside-cut = 0** (max held-out↔train identity 0.699 < the 0.70 cut). Bare unit suite **214 passed / 33 skipped** (split test's numpy/pandas tiers `importorskip`) + **13/13** with numpy+pandas; ruff 0.15.15 + black 25.11.0 clean; `snakemake --lint` "good condition" + all 4 rules `-n` resolve.
**Decisions.** **Validation-gate STOP → ADR-0004 D2 Amendment A1 (user sign-off 2026-07-10, §7 item 2/4, §2.3 re-sign-off).** The first real build was **degenerate** — the literal D2 coverage clause ("≥0.70 of the *shorter member's* consensus span") let **13 low-occupancy hub sequences** (aligning to only 1–3 of 224 consensus columns; node degree ≤ 8,642) single-linkage-bridge **20,941/23,569 records (88.9 %) across 66 orders / 29 phyla** into one cluster, so the clade-crossing rule collapsed the training fold to **676 (2.9 %)** — contradicting D2's own pinned "aligns-poorly-to-RF00230 → singleton" rationale. Distances were sound (median pairwise identity 0.46; only 0.1 % of pairs ≥ cut). Presented the gate failure + the ADR internal inconsistency + a verified fix; user chose **coverage vs the RF00230 model consensus (`clen`)** over a separate min-occupancy gate / revisiting linkage. A sequence covering < 0.70 of the model now forms no edge → forced singleton (the realised intent); pinned 0.70 unchanged. Result: largest cluster 20,941 → 1,238; train 2.9 % → 35 %. Amendment A1 + both sign-offs recorded in `docs/decisions/ADR-0004-*.md`. Also: afa `--outformat` caps at 10k seqs → Pfam mandatory (parser handles both); the D5 nested fold reserves the top Firmicutes orders for training since holding out all 32 ≥20-orders (95 % of corpus) is infeasible. context7 §3.3: Infernal not indexed → cmalign Pfam column convention (uppercase/`-` match, lowercase/`.` insert) verified empirically; scipy/numpy union-find cross-checked vs `connected_components`.
**Commit.** the P0-22 atomic commit on branch `p0-22-splits`.

## Step P0-23 — 2026-07-10: Commit the per-record split-assignment table (git/LFS)
**Inputs.** DVC-interim `data/interim/splits/split_assignments.parquet` (P0-22; 23,569 × 20, already sequence-free); DVC corpus `data/processed/master_clean_v0.parquet` (P0-12; whole-file hash-link, sha256 `1eb76591…b062dd2`); audit `data/processed/audits/split_construction_report.json` (P0-22; the DOME redundancy numbers); ADR-0004 (variant→parent provenance; DOME reporting) + PRD §9.2/§16.
**Process.** New `src/tbox_finder/splits.py::{build_split_table, validate_table_schema, dome_reporting_fields, write_table}` + a `write-table` CLI subcommand and `workflow/rules/data.smk::split_assignment_table` (LOCAL, out of `rule all`, data env) project the interim table onto the canonical committed schema: `seq_name`→`record_id` (unique, sequence-free join key), `record_sha256`→`corpus_record_sha256` (per-record hash-link; empty externals → NA), and `parent_record_id` set to each row's own `record_id` (base-record self-reference — P2 appends augmented/synthetic variant rows carrying their parent's id). `validate_table_schema` enforces the columns as a **closed, ordered allowlist** (the structural "no sequences" guarantee) + a sequence-column denylist, `record_id` uniqueness/non-null, `parent_record_id` intra-table resolvability, and a 64-hex `corpus_record_sha256` on every `source==corpus` row; the no-cluster-split leakage invariant (`_assert_no_cluster_split`) is re-asserted on the committed copy. `dome_reporting_fields` copies the histogram + cut + clade-crossing numbers verbatim from the construction report (no fabrication, §10.3). The whole-file corpus hash-link is recorded in the provenance `inputs`; DOME redundancy + partition-strategy fields under `extra.dome`.
**Outputs.** `data/processed/splits/split_assignments.parquet` **committed to git/LFS** (23,569 × 20 = 23,535 corpus + 34 external [16 anchor + 18 blind]; 9,603 clusters) + `split_assignments.provenance.json` (DOME fields; corpus whole-file sha `1eb76591…b062dd2` in `inputs`); `tests/unit/test_split_table_schema.py` (17 tests, 5 tiers). Committed table's `record_id` unique, `parent_record_id`==`record_id` for all base rows, corpus rows all 64-hex hash-links, externals NA. **No DVC artifact** (git/LFS carve-out is the deliverable). `.gitattributes` LFS entry pre-existed (P0-22).
**Validation.** PASSED — table git/LFS-committed; schema complete (20 cols, closed allowlist ⇒ no sequences); hash-link resolves (per-record `corpus_record_sha256` 64-hex + whole-file `1eb76591…b062dd2` == live corpus, asserted by test); DOME redundancy (`n_heldout_at_or_above_cut`=0, `max_heldout_to_train_identity`=0.6994 < 0.70) + partition-strategy fields present; no cluster straddles nested train/heldout. `pytest tests/unit/test_split_table_schema.py` **17 passed** (pandas+pyarrow) / **9 passed + 8 skipped** bare (pandas tiers `importorskip`; the stdlib schema-constant + DOME + provenance-sidecar tiers run bare); full unit suite **223 passed / 41 skipped** bare (+17 vs P0-22, no regression); ruff 0.15.15 + black 25.11.0 (`--target-version py312`) clean; `snakemake --lint` "good condition" + `-n split_assignment_table` resolves.
**Decisions.** Canonical `record_id`:=`seq_name` (the interim `record_sha256` is non-unique — empty for the 34 externals — so it is the *hash-link* column, not the id); `parent_record_id` is fixed to self-reference `record_id` (the interim mirrored `record_sha256`, which is the wrong domain for the P0-24 variant→parent join). "Hash-linked" realised in **both** senses (per-record `corpus_record_sha256` + whole-file sha in provenance `inputs`). The CI-safety of the schema test: stdlib tiers (schema constants, DOME, provenance sidecar) always run; the pandas tiers `importorskip`; the committed-parquet + live-corpus-hash tiers skip on a Git-LFS pointer (unsmudged in CI) / absent DVC corpus. context7 §3.3: n/a — reuses the established pandas `read_parquet`/`rename`/`to_parquet` idioms (P0-12/P0-22), no new API. DOME (DOI:10.1093/gigascience/giae094, PMID:39661723) is a settled methodological standard already cited in PRD §16 → no §10.1 gate.
**Commit.** the P0-23 atomic commit on branch `p0-23-split-table`.

## Step P0-24 — 2026-07-10: No-leakage CI test over the real ~23,569-record partition
**Inputs.** The committed git/LFS split-assignment table `data/processed/splits/split_assignments.parquet` (P0-23; 23,569 × 20, sequence-free) + its `split_assignments.provenance.json` (`extra.n_records`); ADR-0004 D7 (per-scheme holdout-unit separation + cluster non-splitting + variant→parent→fold + D4 defined behaviour), D3/D4/D5; CLAUDE.md §8.2/§8.5; PRD §9.2.
**Process.** New `tests/ml/test_no_leakage.py` — the load-bearing §8.2 gate. Ten **stdlib-only pure predicates** over plain column lists (`clusters_split_across_random_fold`, `clusters_mixing_train_and_heldout`, `nested_role_train_flag_inconsistent`, `designated_holdouts_in_training`, `order_rank_train_test_straddle`, `phylum_holdout_cluster_straddle`, `no_clade_records_silently_passing`, `external_positive_leaks`, `external_cluster_training_twins`, `variant_parent_fold_mismatches`) each return the violation list; every predicate has a **clean-table pass AND a deliberately-leaky fail** unit test (the guard is proven to bite — §8.7/§10.3). `_load_committed_columns` reads the parquet via `pyarrow.parquet.read_table(...).to_pydict()` (stdlib has no parquet reader; nulls→`None`). Real-table tier parametrized per §9.2 scheme (random / leave-clade-out cluster non-splitting / leave-one-order-out / Actinobacteria phylum / D4 / independent-sets / variant→parent). Removed the `tests/ml/test_ml_scaffold.py` placeholder (its docstring: delete once a real `tests/ml/test_*.py` lands). Wired into CI: the `test` job now checks out `lfs: true` (smudges the table) + installs `pyarrow==24.0.0` (pinned == `envs/data.yml`; isolated CI tool, the conda-lock/git-lfs precedent — no science-env/ML-stack change) + sets `TBOX_REQUIRE_NO_LEAKAGE=1` so an unreadable table **fails** (never silently skips) the job — the gate cannot rot.
**Outputs.** `tests/ml/test_no_leakage.py` (25 tests: 17 pure-predicate + 8 real-table); `.github/workflows/ci.yml` `test` job (lfs + pyarrow + env). No new data artifact; no `.smk`/`src` change (DAG lint unaffected).
**Validation.** PASSED — **no leakage on the real partition for every §9.2 scheme.** 0 clusters split across `fold_random`; 0 clusters mixing nested train + held-out; `nested_train ⟺ nested_role=='train'`; 0 designated holdouts (LOO orders / anchors / Actinobacteria) in training; 0 order-rank straddles (Firmicutes at phylum correctly **not** flagged — the "not non-spanning at every rank" caveat is a passing test); D4 clean (corpus `resolved_order` NULL ⟺ `dropped_from_clade_holdout`; dropped never in nested training, never designated, always in random-only bucket); the 16 anchor + 18 blind independent positives + their corpus cluster-twins all held out of training; variant→parent→fold vacuous-clean (fully self-parented base table). CI-exact `pytest tests/ml/test_no_leakage.py` with pyarrow + `TBOX_REQUIRE_NO_LEAKAGE=1` → **25 passed**; full CI-exact suite **250 passed / 43 skipped** (no regression); rot guard verified (env-set + pyarrow-absent → 8 fail-loud errors, not skips); bare local → 17 passed / 8 graceful skips; ruff 0.15.15 + black 25.11.0 clean repo-wide; `ci.yml` valid YAML.
**Decisions.** The committed git/LFS table is not smudged by `actions/checkout` by default and CI installs no parquet reader → a naive test would **silently skip in CI**, making the load-bearing gate non-functional (a §10.3 gap that contradicts ADR-0004 D7 "re-checks … on every PR"). Fixed by making CI provide the data (`lfs: true` + pinned `pyarrow`) and by the `TBOX_REQUIRE_NO_LEAKAGE=1` **fail-not-skip** contract — the CI plumbing is squarely the P0-24 declared artifact ("wired into the tests/ml CI job (P0-08)"), not a threshold/ADR change. Straddle checks are applied only at ranks where a whole taxon is designated held out (order, phylum) — a blanket every-rank straddle would false-positive on Firmicutes at phylum (exactly what D7 warns against), so class-scheme separation rests on cluster non-splitting (the nested realization) + the order/phylum/anchor designated checks; no per-class designated set is fabricated (P0-17's additional class-II set is verified-empty). The 4 `dropped` records that land in `heldout` via a clade-crossing cluster are safe (held out, never trained) → the D4 assertion is "dropped ⟹ never `nested_train`", not "⟹ role==dropped". context7 §3.3: verified `pyarrow.parquet.read_table(...).to_pydict()` (Apache Arrow docs) — the only third-party call; leakage logic is stdlib.
**Commit.** the P0-24 atomic commit on branch `p0-24-no-leakage-test`.

## Step P0-25 — 2026-07-11: Author ADR-0005 (Non-circular eval design)
**Inputs.** PRD §2.3 (GATE-1/GATE-2 gate table + GATE-1 pre-registration detail + gate-precedence/blinded-freeze policy), §5 (the five non-circular mechanisms), §6 (Stage-1↔Stage-2 integration + overlapping-window reconciliation + strand resolver), §9.1 (four decoy classes + mining protection), §11 (recalibration stack order + aux-loss weighting), §12 (ECE/FDR/OOD-drift framework), §13.1 (scan decision machinery); ADR-0004 (split/precedence/GATE-4/variant-provenance), ADR-0003 (governing GTDB release, minimum-viable scan, compute ceilings); the P0-16/P0-17 raw arm-(c)/class-II counts (consumed for the min-N *rule*, values deferred to P0-26). Scientific-evidence gate (§10.1) sources for the D1 fixed identity-bin edges.
**Process.** Authored `docs/decisions/ADR-0005-non-circular-eval-design.md` (18 decisions, D1–D18) pinning every GATE-1/GATE-2 rule the PRD delegates here, with numeric *defaults* under the §2.3 precedence carve-out (blinded-frozen at P0). D1 identity bins (fixed edges, not quantile) + 5 divergence levels; D2 `cmsearch` operating point (RF00230 GA + class-II CM threshold); D3 scan machinery (Stage-1 recall-floor rule, the §6 log-sum-exp→argmax overlapping-window logit-reconciliation operator + offset augmentation, Stage-2 FDP≤10 % point); D4 two-part GATE-1 bar (+10 pp point AND +5 pp CI-floor; weak clause = min-N fallback); D5 block-level resampling + macro-average across held-out orders; D6 headline-certifying arms + AND-of-powered-arms + reported-not-gated → §7 stop-and-ask; D7 single pinned decoy prevalence (four §9.1 decoys = labeled negatives) + sweep + arm-(c) precision basis + P0 sourcing fallback; D8 synthetic-arm generator-validity/structural-realism/model-side-leakage/power-budget; D9 class-II anti-mimicry Stage-1-only + construction-powered recovery + min-graded-evidence floor + within-phylum control; D10 §5-mechanism-4 PU-framing scope (open-scan only; never enters GATE-1 precision); D11 GATE-2 in-dist ECE on the named posterior + binned estimator + recalibration stack; D12 GATE-2 FDR CI-upper-bound ≤ 10 % on the consensus null + target-decoy calibration check + conformal-as-diagnostic; D13 OOD-ECE/drift rule + calibrated-negative-PASS conditions; D14 mining spare-rule + Tier-2N probe; D15 strand resolver + strand-robustness diagnostic + directionality-preserving RC; D16 aux-loss weighting + with/without-aux GATE-2 check; D17 RNA-FM swap trigger margins (numeric); D18 delegation map (min-N→P0-26, OOD min-N→P0-27, magnitude rationales→P0-28, GTDB/prior→ADR-0003/P0-14, GATE-4/split→ADR-0004, §13.3→ADR-0006).
**Outputs.** `docs/decisions/ADR-0005-non-circular-eval-design.md` (Accepted). Prose-only diff (ADR + this dev-log stanza) → no `.smk`/`src`/data/test change; DAG lint unaffected; no DVC artifact.
**Validation.** PASSED — every delegated GATE-1/GATE-2 threshold written as rule + default value; the D1 identity-bin edges are **fixed (not quantile)** and Freyhult-sourced; the §5-mechanism-4 PU-framing scope is written (CM-negatives unlabeled on the §13 scan; model-unique precision only by orthogonal evidence; never enters GATE-1 closed-benchmark precision); the AND-of-powered-arms combination + block-resampling + macro-average are explicit (D5/D6); the RNA-FM swap margins are numeric (D17: ECE +0.02 / recall +3 pp / AUPRC +0.03); **user sign-off 2026-07-11 ("accept as drafted")**.
**Decisions.** **New-ADR sign-off (§7 item 2, user 2026-07-11).** **Scientific-evidence gate (§10.1) CLEARED** (high-stakes → ≥2 independent agreeing peer-reviewed sources, no disagreement): the D1 fixed low-identity bin edges are sourced against the documented collapse of sequence-based homology search on divergent ncRNA — Freyhult, Bollback & Gardner 2007 [PMID:17151342; DOI:10.1101/gr.5890907] + Menzel, Gorodkin & Stadler 2009 [PMID:19861422; DOI:10.1261/rna.1556009] (both accessed 2026-07-10) — cited for the qualitative divergence-sensitivity finding only; **no numeric cutoff transcribed** from either paper's tables (§10.3). Blinded-frozen numeric *defaults* chosen (judgment calls beyond the PRD's stated defaults): D7 benchmark decoy prevalence **100:1** (distinct from the §9.1 10:1 training ratio, with a 10:1→10⁴:1 sweep); D17 RNA-FM swap margins; D1 five divergence levels {40,55,65,78,92}%; D11 15 equal-mass debiased ECE bins; D16 fixed aux weights. The min-N floor (P0-26), OOD-ECE min-N admissibility floor (P0-27), and authored magnitude rationales (P0-28) are pinned by later P0 steps that **amend** this ADR (D18) — the rules that consume them are locked now. This step pins the *rules*; the magnitude *values* are authored + blinded-frozen at P0-28. context7 §3.3: n/a (ADR authoring — no third-party library code). §10.1 tools: PubMed (Consensus quota-blocked → fallback ladder; PubMed sufficed for both peer-reviewed cites).
**Commit.** the P0-25 atomic commit on branch `p0-25-adr-0005`.

## Step P0-26 — 2026-07-11: GATE-1 power-budget audit — pins min-real-homolog N (ADR-0005 A1)
**Inputs.** The P0-22 leave-clade-out partition (`data/interim/splits/split_assignments.parquet`, 23,569 records) + its per-class alignments (`aligned/class_{I,II}.sto`); ADR-0005 D1 fixed identity-bin edges; the P0-16 GATE-1-anchor raw counts (`data/external/gate1_anchor/gate1_anchor_report.json`) + the P0-17 additional-class-II raw counts (`data/external/classII_positives/classII_report.json`). Identity = the ADR-0004 D2 consensus-column metric (`coverage_cut = 0.70`), reused verbatim from `splits.py` (no divergent second definition).
**Process.** `src/tbox_finder/power.py` (`workflow/rules/data.smk::power_budget_audit`, LOCAL, data env) recomputes each held-out record's nearest **nested-training-fold** identity via `splits._nearest_cross_fold_identity` per class, bins by the D1 fixed edges per leave-one-order-out round AND pooled, counts real low-identity homologs, and renders each D6 headline-arm's reachability vs the pinned min-N; a viz-env `plot_power_figures` rule renders the three figures. Consumes the P0-16/P0-17 report JSONs (dotted-key reads; missing key raises — no silent 0) to render the arm-(c) sourcing-fallback trigger + the class-II independent-set verdict. Report: `data/processed/audits/power_budget_report.json` (+ provenance, git-tracked audit carve-out); figures git-LFS under `figures/power/`.
**Outputs.** `src/tbox_finder/power.py` + `tests/unit/test_power_budget.py` (22 tests: 18 pure-predicate + `_read_counts` tiers run bare, 4 pandas-gated `build_report` tiers) + 2 `data.smk` rules; `data/processed/audits/power_budget_report.json` + `power_figure_data.json` + provenance; `figures/power/{identity_bin_counts,per_order_counts,arm_reachability}.png` (git-LFS); ADR-0005 **Amendment A1**. No DVC artifact (git-tracked audit + git-LFS figures, per the P0-19 precedent).
**Validation.** PASSED — per-bin N reported per-round (43 held-out orders, 30 ≥ min-N) AND pooled; low-identity-homolog counts reported (6,878 measurable `<70%` + 1,871 no-adequate-neighbour = 8,749); **min-real-homolog-N pinned = 20** (user sign-off 2026-07-11); every headline-certifying cell's reachability stated. **Held-out N = 8,749, all < 0.70 identity to nested-train (max 0.699)** → `<50`: 85 · `50–70`: 6,793 · `70–85`: **0** · `85–100`: **0** · no-neighbour: 1,871 (the upper two D1 bins are provably empty for the leave-clade-out arm). **Arms:** (1) lowest-identity bins pooled 8,749/43 blocks → **POWERED**; (2) non-Firmicutes-order subgroup 1,635/34 blocks → **POWERED**; upper bins 70–100% = 0 → structurally empty; arm (c) anchor = 16 < 20 → **below min-N**; class-II independent-of-Actinobacteria natural = 0 < 20 → **below min-N**. CI-exact `pytest tests/unit/test_power_budget.py` → 22 passed (with deps) / 18 passed + 4 skipped (bare); full unit suite **241 passed / 45 skipped** bare, **291 passed** with deps (no regression); ruff 0.15.15 + black 25.11.0 clean; `snakemake --lint` "good condition" + both new rules `-n` resolve.
**Decisions.** **ADR-0005 Amendment A1 sign-off (§7 item 2, user 2026-07-11 "accept 20").** min-N = 20 pinned as an **estimability floor** (at N < 20 the recall granularity 1/N > 5 pp exceeds the D4 strong-bar positive floor, so the tighter CI cannot be estimated → D4 weak clause admissible), internally consistent with the split's already-signed-off well-powered LOO unit (`conf/data/splits.yaml min_heldout_positives = 20`) and PRD §12 — one floor, not two; a companion per-arm block count is reported (D5 block resampling) but is not a second pinned floor. **Arm-(c) sourcing-fallback (§7 stop-and-ask, D7; user 2026-07-11 "drop from AND, rest on subgroup"):** the P0-16 anchor's 16 real loci fall below min-N → **arm (c) dropped from the D6 mandatory AND**; the beyond-Firmicutes certification rests on the **powered** non-Firmicutes-order subgroup (1,635/34 blocks), the D6 floor is satisfied, and the 16 anchor loci are reported as corroborating (non-gating) — no speculative re-sourcing (P0-16 already exhausted the Vitreschak non-Firmicutes hosts). **Class-II anti-mimicry (D9):** the natural independent-of-Actinobacteria class-II is 0 → reported-not-gated; the sub-arm rests on the P2 construction-powered synthetic recovery set + the D9 within-phylum control (as pre-registered); the total held-out class-II ≈ 1,190 is Actinobacteria-single-phylum (memorization-confounded) and the ~12 non-Actinobacteria held-out class-II corpus records are CM/DB-derived P0-17 *leads*, not independent positives. **Synthetic-divergence arm (D8):** the real bins reach only 0.699 identity, so the deep-divergence (`<40%`) cells — the pre-registered precondition for the §1 CM-invisibility claim — are supplied only by the P2/P4 synthetic arm + the §13 campaign. No fabrication (§10.3): every count is read from the real corpus/report artifacts. context7 §3.3: n/a (reuses established numpy/pandas + `splits`/`provenance` idioms; matplotlib mirrors the P0-22 viz rule).
**Commit.** the P0-26 atomic commit on branch `p0-26-power-budget`.

## Step P0-27 — 2026-07-11: OOD-ECE min-N coverage simulation — pins ADR-0005 D13 floor (A2)
**Inputs.** The P0-22 leave-clade-out partition (`data/interim/splits/split_assignments.parquet`, 23,569 records — held-out per-order structure); the signed P0-26 `power_budget_report.json` (per-order N, consumed as a non-fabrication cross-check); the ADR-0005 recall floor `MIN_REAL_HOMOLOG_N = 20` (A1); PRD §12 (OOD-ECE/drift rule + the coverage-sim mandate "how many held-out orders clear the min-N bar"), §7.2 (per-corpus prior structure + the named zero-positive scan superclades), §2.3 (project-level rollup categories); `conf/data/coverage.yaml` (seed 42, B = 2000).
**Process.** `src/tbox_finder/coverage.py` (`workflow/rules/data.smk::ood_ece_coverage_sim`, LOCAL, data env) reads the held-out subframe (`nested_role == "heldout"`), groups by `loo_order_unit` exactly as `power.build_report` (default groupby drops the 34 externals + 4 clade-crossing-swept rows → the resolved leave-one-order-out units), counts per-order real positives, classifies each order adjudicable (≥ floor) vs sub-min-N inconclusive-by-rule, runs a **seeded block bootstrap over held-out orders** (the D5 resampling block) for the adjudicable-fraction CI, cross-checks per-order N byte-for-byte against the P0-26 report, and assembles the predicted per-corpus verdict-vector shape (§2.3 rollup input). A viz-env `plot_coverage_figures` rule renders the per-order coverage, floor-sweep sensitivity, and verdict-vector-shape figures. Pure predicates (stdlib) on top, pandas/numpy lazy below; the floor is **frozen in code** (no CLI/config override → no committed report can contradict the pin, A1 precedent). Report `data/processed/audits/ood_ece_coverage_report.json` (+ provenance, git-tracked audit carve-out); figures git-LFS under `figures/coverage/`.
**Outputs.** `src/tbox_finder/coverage.py` + `tests/unit/test_coverage_sim.py` (17 tests: 13 pure-predicate run bare + 4 pandas/numpy-gated real-partition tiers) + 2 `data.smk` rules + `conf/data/coverage.yaml`; `data/processed/audits/ood_ece_coverage_report.json` + `ood_ece_coverage_figure_data.json` + provenance; `figures/coverage/{per_order_coverage,floor_sweep_coverage,verdict_vector_shape}.png` (git-LFS); ADR-0005 **Amendment A2** (pins `OOD_ECE_MIN_N`). No DVC artifact (git-tracked audit + git-LFS figures, per the P0-19/P0-26 precedent).
**Validation.** PASSED — the sim reports the count of min-N-clearing held-out orders (**30 / 43**), the adjudicable fraction (**0.698** among positive-bearing orders; block-bootstrap 95 % CI **0.558–0.837**, clearing-count CI 24–36), the inconclusive-by-rule fraction (**13** sub-min-N orders + the 4 named zero-positive scan superclades — measured-absent from the corpus), and the predicted per-corpus verdict-vector shape (adjudicable 30 · sub-min-N 13 · zero-positive-named 4); the **"discovery-predominantly-inconclusive" modal shape is quantified ex ante** (footprint = 7 bacterial phyla / 0 archaeal vs a whole-tree scan). Floor sweep {10 → 32 · 15 → 31 · 20 → 30 · 30 → 22 · 50 → 16}. **Non-fabrication guard:** per-order N byte-matches the P0-26 report (0 mismatched orders); internal consistency `OOD_ECE_MIN_N == MIN_REAL_HOMOLOG_N == 20`. CI-exact `pytest tests/unit/test_coverage_sim.py` → 17 passed (with deps) / 13 passed + 4 skipped (bare); full unit suite **254 passed / 50 skipped** bare (+13 vs P0-26, no regression); ruff 0.15.15 + black 25.11.0 clean; `snakemake --lint` "good condition" + both new rules `-n` resolve.
**Decisions.** **ADR-0005 Amendment A2 sign-off resolved (§7 item 2, user 2026-07-11 "accept 20 as drafted"; the D18 OOD-ECE-min-N delegation; imp.md's "Stops: none" is stale, overridden by ADR-0005 lines 10/121/157/176/181 which state P0-27 *amends* this ADR — ADR > imp.md, flagged per CLAUDE.md §1).** `OOD_ECE_MIN_N = 20` pinned as an **admissibility floor** (below it the D13 small-N-robust OOD-ECE estimator is inadmissible → the corpus is inconclusive-by-rule, never a silent calibrated-negative PASS), internally consistent with the A1 recall floor + the split's `min_heldout_positives = 20` + PRD §12 — one number across the eval contract; a higher floor (30/50, reported in the sweep) only makes *more* corpora inconclusive-by-rule (conservative), so 20 is pinned for consistency. **The floor is an *estimability* gate, not a power-to-pass floor** — clearing it admits an OOD-ECE estimate; a calibrated-negative PASS additionally requires the D13 drift bound + detection-power floor (separate P3/P4 quantities), so a budget-forced under-scope cannot masquerade as a calibrated-negative. **"Discovery-predominantly-inconclusive" is pre-registered ex ante (§2.3):** the adjudicable calibration footprint touches only 7 bacterial phyla (hyper-concentrated — Firmicutes 81.2 % of corpus held-out, Lactobacillales 61.1 % of all held-out; 0 archaeal), while the §13 scan (PRD §7.2) targets the whole prokaryotic tree incl. the named zero-positive superclades {Archaea, DPANN, CPR/Patescibacteria, candidate phyla} — each inconclusive-by-rule before any scan. Scan-wide adjudicable fraction is **not pinnable here** (GTDB enumeration deferred to ADR-0003) — reported structurally as bounded by nearest-relative reach. No fabrication (§10.3): every count read from the real partition/report; the archaeal absence is the CM-catalogue's ascertainment-limited silence (PRD §7.2), not asserted. Feeds P0-29 (ADR-0006 rollup consumes the verdict-vector shape), P3 (ECE estimator floor), P6 (adjudicable-fraction expectations). context7 §3.3: n/a (reuses established pandas/numpy + `power`/`splits`/`provenance` idioms; matplotlib mirrors the P0-26 viz rule).
**Commit.** the P0-27 atomic commit on branch `p0-27-coverage-sim`.

## Step P0-28 — 2026-07-11: Gate-default magnitude rationales (blinded-freeze at P0)
**Inputs.** The pinned decoy prevalence (ADR-0005 D7, 100:1) + per-bin/per-arm min-N (Amendment A1/A2, `= 20`; `data/processed/audits/power_budget_report.json`); the delegated blinded-frozen defaults of ADR-0005 D4 (+10 pp / +5 pp), D7 (100:1), D11 (ECE ≤ 0.05), D12 (FDR ≤ 10 %), D17 (0.02 / 3 pp / 0.03 swap margins) + ADR-0004 D6 (GATE-4 ≥ 0.80). PRD §2.3 (magnitude rationale + blinded freeze).
**Process.** Authored a **smallest-effect-of-interest (SESOI) / power argument for EACH delegated default**, *before any P4 result exists* (the §2.3 anti-p-hacking guard). `src/tbox_finder/power.py` gained the pinned default constants (single source of truth) + a verified-`CITATIONS` registry + pure stdlib-math backers (`binomial_se`, `recall_bar_resolution`, `min_detectable_effect_pp`, `expected_false_at_fdr`, `calibration_fdr_budget_ratio`) and the `magnitude_rationale(key)` / `all_rationales()` helper returning the authored record per default. `analyses/gate_default_rationales.qmd` renders those records **verbatim from the helper** (no hand-typed numbers → no code/doc/ADR drift). Key arguments: the **+5 pp CI floor = 1/20 = the per-positive recall granularity at min-N** — the *same* `1/N ≥ 5 pp` argument that pinned `MIN_REAL_HOMOLOG_N` (A1), so bar and floor are one construction; the **+10 pp point bar = two granularities** (point sits a full CI-floor-width above the +5 pp boundary); **ECE ≤ 0.05 = half the D12 FDR budget** (0.05/0.10) + estimator-resolvable at 15 equal-mass bins; **FDR ≤ 10 % = a *discovery*-stage FDR** on the pre-orthogonal table (ADR-0006 orthogonal validation is the terminal FP control); D17 margins = SESOIs on the backbone-choice decision (0.02 = 40 % of the ECE gate; 3 pp = smallest *sustained* recall deficit; 0.03 AUPRC); **GATE-4 0.80** co-authored into ADR-0004 D6. **Scientific-evidence gate (§10.1) cleared** — ≥2 identifier-verified agreeing method sources per high-stakes convention (SESOI: Lakens 2017 [DOI:10.1177/1948550617697177] + Lakens/Scheel/Isager 2018 [DOI:10.1177/2515245918770963]; binned-ECE: Guo 2017 [arXiv:1706.04599] + Naeini 2015 [PMID:25927013]; discovery-FDR: Benjamini-Hochberg 1995 [DOI:10.1111/j.2517-6161.1995.tb02031.x] + Storey-Tibshirani 2003 [DOI:10.1073/pnas.1530509100] + Elias-Gygi 2007 [PMID:17327847]) — **no numeric cutoff transcribed from any paper** (§10.3), the values are the project's own SESOI judgments.
**Outputs.** `analyses/gate_default_rationales.qmd`; `src/tbox_finder/power.py` (constants + `CITATIONS` + 5 numeric backers + shared `_require_count`/`_require_number` validators + `magnitude_rationale`/`all_rationales`); `tests/unit/test_magnitude_rationale.py` (69 tests, pure stdlib); ADR-0005 **Amendment A3** + ADR-0004 **Amendment A2**. No `.smk`/data/DVC artifact (prose + pure helper + test; DAG lint unaffected).
**Validation.** PASSED — every delegated default carries a numeric SESOI/power justification; the blinded-freeze is declared (no post-P4 change; pre-P4 recalibration needs ADR sign-off); internally consistent with the A1/A2 min-N=20 (the `test_constants_match_adr_pinned_values` guard asserts the code constants equal the ADR-pinned values byte-for-byte, `test_recall_bar_resolution_bite_at_wrong_min_n` proves the estimability guard bites, and `test_recall_prose_is_derived_from_min_n_not_hardcoded` guards the prose against a min-N drift). CI-exact `pytest tests/unit/test_magnitude_rationale.py` → **69 passed**; full bare unit suite **323 passed / 50 skipped** (+69 vs P0-27, no regression); ruff 0.15.15 + black 25.11.0 clean; no workflow files touched. **CodeRabbit CLI 0.6.5 rounds 1–3 (all findings valid, all fixed):** two durable-artifact correctness fixes — the `swap_recall_margin` argument said a >3 pp gap erodes "over half" the D4 margin (corrected to the computed "30 % of the +10 pp point bar / 60 % of the +5 pp CI floor"), and the recall prose hard-coded "20 / 1-in-20" (round-3 major: now **derived from `MIN_REAL_HOMOLOG_N`** so a future min-N change can't leave stale rationale text — the single-source-of-truth property this step is built on); plus input-validation hardening across every numeric backer (positive-integer counts, strictly-interior baseline, finite positive z, ece/fdr rate bounds, and **boolean rejection** on all rate params — `bool` is an `int` subclass) via shared `_require_count`/`_require_number` + 37 regression tests. Report/helper values unchanged where numeric.
**Decisions.** **ADR-0005 Amendment A3 + ADR-0004 Amendment A2 sign-off resolved (§7 item 2, user 2026-07-11 "accept both as drafted").** The **honest MDE caveat is recorded, not hidden** (A3): the naïve normal-approx minimum-detectable-effect at N=20 / baseline 0.5 is ≈22 pp — *larger* than the +10 pp bar — because min-N=20 makes the +5 pp CI floor **estimable**, not the exactly-min-N arm **powered to pass**; the gated inference is the block-bootstrap CI + the D5 small-N exact/permutation test, and powered arms pool far above 20 (lowest-identity pool 8,749 / 43 blocks; non-Firmicutes-order subgroup 1,635 / 34 blocks — A1). The rationale text lives in one place (`magnitude_rationale`) so the ADR, the QMD, and the constants cannot disagree — a unit test enforces it. This closes the **third and last D18-deferred value** (authored magnitude-rationale text), after A1 (min-N) and A2 (OOD-ECE floor); the P0 seed-ADR delegated-default set is now fully documented + frozen. Feeds P4 (GATE-1 inherits the frozen defaults, unchangeable post-unblinding) + P5 (FDR). context7 §3.3: n/a (pure stdlib `math` + reuse of the established `power` idioms; no third-party library code).
**Commit.** the P0-28 atomic commit on branch `p0-28-magnitude-rationales`.

## Step P0-29 — 2026-07-11: Author ADR-0006 — validation decision rule & tiering (the anti-circularity validation contract)
**Inputs.** PRD §13.3 (confirmed-novel decision rule + tiering), §13.2 (orthogonal in-silico validation pipeline), §7.2 (assembly grades AQ/MQ/LQ + union novelty prior + archaeal stretch-target posture), §2.3 (project-level rollup + breadth floor), §12 (calibrated-negative-PASS conditions); ADR-0005 (D3/D7/D9/D12/D13/D14 — the eval contract this ADR consumes; the D18 delegation of the §13.3 rule + model-independent homolog-search thresholds + rollup to ADR-0006), ADR-0001 D7 (the three project-level GATE-3 outcome strings), ADR-0004 D1 (element precedence reused by the (b) predicate); `src/tbox_finder/coverage.py` (P0-27 verdict-vector shape — `verdict_vector_shape` / `OOD_ECE_MIN_N` / `predicted_gate3_modal_shape`); `data/processed/priors/union_prior.parquet` (P0-14 masking-denominator schema: `accession` + `locus_start`/`locus_end`).
**Process.** Authored `docs/decisions/ADR-0006-validation-decision-rule-and-tiering.md` (17 decisions D1–D17 + a frozen *Predicate specifications* section, ADR-0005 house style), pinning the `a ∧ b ∧ c` confirmed-novel rule with `(d)`-supporting (D1–D5), the model-independent short-Stem-I/class-II predicate (D6), CM-free de-novo homolog-set assembly + RF00230 alignability cutoff + canonical-holdout invariance (D7/D8), the exhaustive + mutually-exclusive Tier-1/2/2N/3 + Indeterminate-d + Unclassified routing (D9, 8-row table), strand corroboration (D10), the union-prior masking **spare rule** consumed by P0-30 (D11), the per-clade `E[false novel clades] < 0.5` bound + real-gene-preserving clade-level null (D12), Tier-2N per-phylum establishment (D13), the assembly-grade × tier eligibility matrix + backlog prioritization (D14), the per-corpus → GATE-3 **rollup** consuming the P0-27 shape (D15), the archaeal posture (D16), and the delegation map (D17). Cleared the §10.1 scientific-evidence gate for the two high-stakes items; fixed the PRD §7.2 archaeal mis-cite in-place (local-only).
**Outputs.** `docs/decisions/ADR-0006-validation-decision-rule-and-tiering.md` (Accepted) + the appended dev-log stanza — the two committed artifacts. **No `src`/`.smk`/data/DVC artifact** (prose ADR + predicate specs; the D1–D15 predicates are implemented + the D6/D7/D8 numeric thresholds frozen at **P6** as `tests/unit/test_validation_rule.py` + `tests/ml/test_gate3_rollup.py`). Local-only edits **not** in the commit (gitignored): PRD §7.2 citation fix; TODO.md.
**Validation.** PASSED (all gate conditions) — the **tier set is complete + mutually exclusive** (D9 routing table partitioned on `(c)` → `(a,b)` → `(d)`/covariation-locus: Tier-1/2/2N + Indeterminate-d + Tier-3 + Unclassified + an unconfirmed catch-all); the `a ∧ b ∧ c` rule is a **frozen unit-testable predicate** (`criterion_a/b/c/d` + `route_tier`); the **rollup** maps the per-corpus verdict vector `{positive / calibrated-negative PASS / inconclusive}` to one of the three ADR-0001 D7 outcomes `{positive / project-level calibrated-negative PASS / discovery-predominantly-inconclusive}` (D15 `gate3_rollup` spec); the **500 bp window + gene-identity requirement are pinned** (D4); **user sign-off 2026-07-11**.
**Decisions.** **New-ADR sign-off (§7 item 2, user 2026-07-11 "accept as drafted").** **Scientific-evidence gate (§10.1) CLEARED** — both high-stakes items ≥2 identifier-verified agreeing peer-reviewed sources (accessed 2026-07-11 via PubMed): the **500 bp** window is a recall-favoring pad (T-box leaders/core ~180–290 nt: Brill 2011 [PMID:21233158; DOI:10.1099/mic.0.047357-0] + Fang 2017 [PMID:28621923; DOI:10.1021/acs.biochem.7b00284] + TBDB [DOI:10.1093/nar/gkaa721]), **specificity from gene-identity, not distance**, and **no numeric cutoff transcribed from any paper** (§10.3 — 500 bp is the project's own engineering choice); the **archaeal posture** rests on riboswitches (incl. TPP) genuinely reaching Archaea (Wakchaure & Ganguly 2023 [PMID:36594112; DOI:10.1002/wrna.1774] + Gupta & Swati 2019 [PMID:31020937; DOI:10.2174/1386207322666190425143301]), with the **residual mechanistic-compatibility possibility held open** (§20), never asserted as a confirmed biological negative. **Flagged + fixed a PRD mis-cite (user "fix now"):** PRD §7.2 listed **PMID:36008760** among archaeal sources, but it is a *bacterial* T-box histidine-regulation paper [DOI:10.1186/s12864-022-08796-y] — corrected in PRD.md, retained only as a union-prior literature-occurrence source. **Judgment call endorsed:** the three data-calibrated thresholds (short-Stem-I nt D6, RF00230 alignability bit-score D8, homolog-search inclusion E/bit D7) are pinned **as rules with numeric values frozen at the P6 phase gate** on the held-out canonical set (ADR-0005 "rule now, value at the phase gate" precedent) rather than fabricated at P0 (§10.3); only the evidence-backed **500 bp** (D4) + **`E[false novel clades] < 0.5`** (D12) are pinned firm now. Feeds P0-30 (D11 masking spare rule), P5 (D12 multiplicity → GATE-3 method sub-gate), P6 (D1–D15 predicate freezing + rollup tests). context7 §3.3: n/a (ADR authoring, no third-party library code).
**Commit.** the P0-29 atomic commit on branch `p0-29-adr-0006`.

## Step P0-30 — 2026-07-11: §9.1 static decoy/negative construction + union-prior loci-masking + residual-contamination report
**Inputs.** T-box GC/length distribution + positive sequences (`data/processed/master_clean_v0.parquet`, P0-12); the full union prior (`data/processed/priors/union_prior.parquet`, P0-14 — 24,160 loci, masking key `accession`+`locus_start`/`locus_end`); own training positives (the P0-20-labelled corpus); the spare-rule masking key (ADR-0006 D11); staged CMs `RF00230.cm`/`TBDB001.cm` (P0-11a); Rfam SAM/TPP/tRNA/purine/FMN/glycine FASTAs (checksummed EBI-FTP fetch); the tboxevo `idtm_validation_negatives.fasta` (8 records) as the fixed external leader/tRNA-adjacent anchor. PRD §9.1 (four pools + masking) / §13.3 (masking reference) / §7.2 (union prior); ADR-0005 D7/D14, ADR-0006 D11.
**Process.** New `src/tbox_finder/decoys.py` (`fetch-refs` | `build`) builds the **four §9.1 pools** — (1) a seeded **0th-order GC+length-matched composition background** bootstrapped from the corpus (GC, length) joint dist (no genome panel at P0; the genome-window realisation + the three FDR nulls are §12/P5), (2) **structured RNAs** from a seeded, checksummed Rfam subsample (streamed + reservoir-sampled to bound the 171-MB tRNA family), (3) **dinucleotide-shuffled** positives via a pure-Python **Altschul-Erikson** random-Eulerian-walk shuffle (algorithmically identical to `esl-shuffle -d`; DOI:10.1093/oxfordjournals.molbev.a040370), (4) the tboxevo **leader/tRNA-adjacent** anchor. New `src/tbox_finder/masking.py` (`LocusIndex` bisect-narrowed flanked overlap + `spare_rule_excludes_from_mining` + `residual_contamination_report`) masks the **full union prior + own positives + a 50-nt flank** from every pool (ADR-0006 D11 / ADR-0005 D14) and reports residual contamination against the union denominator. `workflow/rules/data.smk::build_decoys` (LOCAL, out of `rule all`, `PYTHONHASHSEED=0`, data env). Fixed a PYTHONHASHSEED-dependent nondeterminism in the shuffle (set-iteration order over the vertex set → sorted) so the pool + golden fixture are reproducible across hash seeds.
**Outputs.** `data/processed/negatives/decoys_v0.parquet` (DVC; 7,008 records × `pool`/`sequence`/`gc`/`masked`/`mask_reason`) + `decoys_v0.provenance.json`; `data/processed/audits/decoys_report.json` (per-pool N, residual-contamination, digest); `data/external/refs/decoys/` (staged Rfam subsample + tboxevo negatives + `decoy_refs.manifest.json`, git-LFS); `conf/data/decoys.yaml` (seed 42 + dinuc-shuffle seed + pool sizing); `tests/unit/test_{decoys,masking}.py` + `tests/golden/test_decoys_golden.py` + `tests/fixtures/decoys_sample/expected.sha256` (`ce9dac04…`). Pools: gc_background 2,000 · structured_rna 3,000 · dinuc_shuffled 2,000 · leader_decoy 8. Full-artifact digest `13061e3e…`; corpus_sha256 `1eb76591…b062dd2` (== the canonical corpus).
**Validation.** PASSED (all gate conditions) — **all four pools built**; the **full union prior + own positives + 50-nt flank masked from every pool** (masking applied to all four; 0 records removed because the P0 pools carry no genomic coordinates, documented — coordinate-masking becomes load-bearing at P2 mined windows); **residual contamination = 3/24,160 = 0.000124** (the un-maskable coordinate-less literature-clade records, ADR-0006 D11); the **spare-rule key encoded + unit-tested** — a Tier-2N-shaped locus (fails canonical architecture, passes any-helix R-scape covariation) is excluded from mining (`test_spare_rule_tier2n_locus_excluded_from_mining`); **golden hash matches** (`ce9dac04…`, hash-seed-independent). Bare unit suite **359 passed / 50 skipped** (+36 vs P0-29, no regression); +38 with pandas (incl. the golden); ruff 0.15.15 + black 25.11.0 clean; `snakemake --lint` "good condition" + `-n build_decoys` resolves; build idempotent (digest stable across re-runs + hash seeds).
**Decisions.** Two engineering realisations faithful to the pinned ADRs (no new ADR / threshold / tier change — §7 item 6, proceed-and-summarise): (i) **pool-1 = a seeded 0th-order GC+length-matched composition null** — the faithful realisation of PRD pool-1 ("random windows matched to T-box GC + length") given that no genome panel is staged at P0 (genomes are the §7.2 scan corpora); labelled honestly in the report, not fabricated data (§10.3). (ii) **dinuc-shuffle implemented in pure Python** (Altschul-Erikson) rather than `esl-shuffle` (infernal env) so `build_decoys` is a single data-env rule and the golden fixture is deterministic + network-free in any env; the PRD §9.1 caveat (the shuffle null must reproduce `cmsearch` decoy behaviour before it is trusted for FDR) is a §12/P5 concern (a distinct estimator set). The masking coordinate-join is real + unit-tested on a synthetic coordinate-carrying pool (proven to bite), even though it is a no-op on the coordinate-free P0 pools — it is the anti-contamination guard for the P2 hard-negative-mining loop. Feeds P2 (hard-negative mining, guarded by the spare rule), P4 (GATE-1 precision denominator at the ADR-0005 D7 100:1 prevalence), P5 (a distinct FDR-null set). context7 §3.3: Biopython `gc_fraction`/`SeqIO` consulted — the trivial GC + FASTA primitives are reimplemented stdlib for bare-env testability (matching `gc_fraction`'s (G+C)/len definition); esl-shuffle/ushuffle surveyed (esl-shuffle bundled in the infernal env; pure-Python A-E chosen for single-env reproducibility).
**Commit.** the P0-30 atomic commit on branch `p0-30-decoys-masking`.

## Step P0-31 — 2026-07-11: Eval-gate regression harness — `metrics.py` + `test_eval_gate.py` + golden CI wiring (the last P0 substep)
**Inputs.** Real fixtures (never mocked, §8.7): the 100-record `tests/fixtures/ingest_sample/Master_tboxes_sample.csv` slice → 8-class per-nt labels via `labels.derive_labels`, plus real decoys via `decoys.build_corpus_pools` (the P0-30 golden slice: 50 GC-background + 80 dinuc = 130). The gate-metric definitions: ADR-0004 **D6** (GATE-4 per-nt per-element F1, min over the three core elements, floor 0.80; boundary IoU reported per element) and ADR-0005 **D2/D4/D7** (GATE-1 recall@matched-precision vs a `cmsearch` baseline + AUPRC; the +10 pp point / +5 pp CI-floor bar) / **D11** (GATE-2 binned-ECE: 15 equal-mass bins, debiased, ≤0.05) / **D5** (block-level resampling + macro-average). Pins single-sourced from `src/tbox_finder/power.py` (P0-26/28).
**Process.** New **`src/tbox_finder/metrics.py`** — the PRD §2 gate-metric **kernel library** P2/P3/P4 will call, written **pure-stdlib** (no numpy/sklearn/pandas import anywhere) so the harness runs and *blocks* in the bare CI `test` env and every kernel is hand-verifiable: `per_nt_class_f1`/`macro_f1`/`micro_f1`, `gate4_core_min_f1` (min-over-core, **not** a mean — D6), `element_extent_iou`, `average_precision` (the step AUPRC estimator), `precision_recall_at_threshold`/`baseline_operating_point`/`recall_at_matched_precision`, `binned_ece` (equal-mass + debias), the `gate1_recall_bar`/`gate2_ece_pass`/`gate4_pass` predicates, `macro_average`, and a seeded `block_bootstrap_ci`. New **`tests/ml/test_eval_gate.py`** — pure-stdlib tiers (10 hand-computed metric checks, each guard proven to bite with a clean-pass **and** a violating-fail) that run+block in bare CI, plus a heavy tier (`importorskip` numpy/sklearn/pandas) that builds the real smoke fixture, runs a **deterministic synthetic smoke "model"** (a seeded stdlib perturbation / score generator — it makes **no** performance claim, §10.3), and asserts every gate metric within tolerance vs the committed **`tests/fixtures/eval_gate_sample/expected.json`**, additionally **cross-checking** `average_precision`/ECE against `sklearn.average_precision_score`/a numpy recomputation. Wired the pinned science stack (`numpy==2.5.1`/`pandas==2.3.3`/`scikit-learn==1.9.0`, == `envs/data.yml`) into `.github/workflows/ci.yml` + `TBOX_REQUIRE_EVAL_GATE=1` so the golden per-stage hashes **and** the eval-gate real-fixture tier **re-run and block in CI** (they `importorskip` these; DVC-only-data tests stay existence-guarded and skip, never error). **context7 §3.3 was monthly-quota-blocked** — the empirical cross-check against the installed scikit-learn 1.9.0 / numpy is the (stronger) verification of the AUPRC/ECE semantics; noted for the PR.
**Outputs.** `src/tbox_finder/metrics.py` (library-only — no CLI/rule/DVC artifact); `tests/ml/test_eval_gate.py`; `tests/fixtures/eval_gate_sample/expected.json` (the deterministic committed expectation — AUPRC 0.9844, gate4 core-min-F1 0.5088 [Specifier, the 3-nt codon, the binding min], ECE plug-in 0.1816 / debiased 0.1070, recall@matched-precision 0.95 vs baseline 0.82 → +13 pp, boundary IoU per core; 100 positives / 130 decoys / 41,513 seg positions); `.github/workflows/ci.yml` (science-stack install + `TBOX_REQUIRE_EVAL_GATE=1`). The three stages' golden `expected.sha256` scaffolding pre-existed (P0-12 ingest / P0-20 labels / P0-30 decoys) — P0-31 makes them *execute* in CI. No DVC artifact.
**Validation.** PASSED — the harness computes each PRD §2 gate metric within tolerance on the real smoke fixture (`pytest tests/ml/test_eval_gate.py` → **13 passed** CI-exact under the pinned stack + `TBOX_REQUIRE_EVAL_GATE=1`); the stdlib `average_precision` matches `sklearn.average_precision_score` to **3.3e-16** and the equal-mass plug-in ECE matches a numpy `array_split` recomputation to **5.6e-17** over 200 randomized trials incl. ties (the ADR-0005 D11 binning + estimator, proven equal to the reference); golden stage hashes reproduce under the pinned stack (`pytest tests/golden` → 6 passed); the pure tiers block in bare CI (10 passed / 3 heavy skip, env unset) and **fail-closed** under `TBOX_REQUIRE_EVAL_GATE=1` (3 heavy fail when the stack is absent — the anti-rot guard bites). Full CI-exact suite **460 passed** (+ the 13 new eval-gate tests, no regression); ruff 0.15.15 + black 25.11.0 clean; `snakemake --lint` "good condition" + `-n` resolves (library-only module, DAG unaffected).
**Decisions.** Three items the ADRs deliberately leave open are documented as **implementer choices, NOT ADR-pinned** (the §10.3 fabrication risk flagged during scoping): the **ECE debiasing term** (D11 pins equal-mass/15/debiased, not the correction — this module subtracts the half-normal expected-deviation noise floor `σ_b·√(2/π)`, motivated by the finite-sample upward bias of plug-in ECE [Guo 2017 arXiv:1706.04599; Naeini 2015 PMID:25927013]; final certification is a P3/ADR concern), the **AUPRC step-vs-interpolated** convention (D-refs pin "not AUROC", not the estimator → matches scikit-learn's step estimator), and the **boundary-IoU band** (pinned "reported per element", no band/threshold → reports the extent IoU; a Cheng-2021 band variant [arXiv:2103.16562] is a non-pinned P2 refinement). **No fabricated metric (§10.3):** the committed `expected.json` is the deterministic harness output on a synthetic smoke model that asserts nothing about real performance; the anti-fabrication guards are the hand-computed pure-tier expectations (independent of the implementation) **and** the sklearn/numpy cross-check (proving the kernels equal the canonical library). `metrics.py` is deliberately **library-only** (no artifact/DVC) — it re-declares no gate number (all pins imported from `power.py`; a drift-guard test asserts equality), so `verifies the harness itself, not model quality` (§8.4). This is the **last P0 substep** → the P0 phase-exit gate is next. context7 §3.3: scikit-learn (AUPRC/calibration) + numpy — quota-blocked; the installed-library cross-check substitutes.
**CodeRabbit.** CLI 0.6.5 round-1 → **1 major (valid, fixed)**: `gate1_recall_bar` failed *open* on a NaN point estimate (`NaN < 10` is False → it fell through to the CI clause and could pass on a valid `ci_lower_pp`), unlike its `gate4_pass`/`gate2_ece_pass` siblings — added a NaN guard so an unmeasurable arm can never certify GATE-1 (§10.3 withhold-don't-emit) + a regression assertion proving the guard bites; round-2 expected clean. GitHub CodeRabbit check + full CI (lint/pytest/snakemake ×2) green on the head SHA — the eval-gate + golden hashes now execute and pass in real CI (pytest job 34 s).
**Commit.** the P0-31 atomic commit on branch `p0-31-eval-gate-metrics` (+ a CodeRabbit-fix commit).
